text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O hasn't shown up to training, and I
can't get in touch with her. Worried, I set off to
look for her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, have you come to meet my reflection in the
lake?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I have never forgotten the visage I first saw
in my formative years. And so, I come here to
revisit it from time to time.
choice_data_list: And yet, you forgot your training.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wh-what have I done? You have my sincerest apologies.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To think, the absence of my brilliance... I have
left you cowering in the frigid night of loneliness!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, stop it! Don't extend the olive branch! For it
is I who left you abandoned and alone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I swear to you now. I shall never leave you ever
again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel the urge to tease her, but I let it be. At least
she understands where she went wrong—in her
own way, of course.
